title: message_set: readAt patch path ignored in Phase 2 silent-path
description: In jmap.rs message_set Phase 2, the path=='readAt' branch calls store.read_message(msg_id, ts) and on success falls through to the outer loop end. However, unknown paths in Phase 2 are also silently ignored ('Unknown patch path: ignore (permissive)'). A readAt patch that has a valid value passes Phase 1 and Phase 2, updating delivery state. But the patch is also in the unknown-path ignore list because the match chain has no 'else return error for unknown'. This means a client sending {"readAt": "...", "unknownField": "x"} will have unknownField silently dropped and the update reported as success — correct for readAt but the update response gives no indication that unknownField was ignored. This could mask typos in field names.
